label: EV Surplus Charging
info:
Automatic EV surplus solar charging for Feyree via dbus-mqtt-devices.
Activates only when Victron mode = Auto (1).
Publishes SetCurrent and StartStop every 30s based on available surplus.

v2 — fixes stale SetCurrent when switching Auto → Manual.

name: ⚙️ CONFIG — edit here
── SECTION 2: Capture EV instance from dbus-mqtt-devices ──
info:
Fires once when dbus-mqtt-devices responds with device instance numbers.
Stores ev1 instance into flow context for use in all MQTT topics.

name: Store EV instance
── SECTION 3: Victron data (continuous, updates flow context) ──
info:
All values are stored in flow context.
The calculation node reads them on each 30s tick.

func:
if (msg.payload !== null && msg.payload !== undefined) flow.set('grid_l1', parseFloat(msg.payload));
return null;

if (msg.payload !== null && msg.payload !== undefined) flow.set('grid_l2', parseFloat(msg.payload));
return null;

if (msg.payload !== null && msg.payload !== undefined) flow.set('grid_l3', parseFloat(msg.payload));
return null;

if (msg.payload !== null && msg.payload !== undefined) flow.set('battery_soc', parseFloat(msg.payload));
return null;

if (msg.payload !== null && msg.payload !== undefined) flow.set('battery_power', parseFloat(msg.payload));
return null;

if (msg.payload && msg.payload.value !== undefined) flow.set('ev_power', parseFloat(msg.payload.value) || 0);
return null;

name: Store & display mode
── SECTION 4: Calculation (every 30s) ──
info:
Timer fires every 30 seconds.
Reads all flow context values, applies surplus algorithm, publishes SetCurrent and StartStop.
Only active when ev_mode === AUTO_MODE_VALUE (1).

name: Calculate surplus & ramp
